text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy to find out that I'm growing! Trainer
tells me that I'll be able to improve even more
because of it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... my running's changed. It feels so awkward
and clumsy now.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Still, Trainer is sure I can overcome this, just like
I've overcome my other obstacles so far. So I'm
feeling a lot more positive about it now!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Also, Sky gets completely soaked in the rain for
some reason... Maybe I should make her some
soup so she doesn't catch a cold.
